traceProperty.queryString: allocator_action_req[0].allocation.size > HEAP_SIZE && trace.timer == 1 --> trace.timer == 1 && nfao_allocator(0).error && nfao_allocator(0).fault_out_of_bounds && nfao_allocator(0).fault_memory_exhaustion
traceProperty.queryComment: Check whether an allocator has an OOB sized request at time 1.
